context_text: <A> to tell you the truth i don't know a whole lot about tv because ah the only show that i ever watch is fox news / <B> yeah / <A> i love fox news down here it's channel thirty three on cable and ah i i love fox news because it really keeps me well informed and i guess being at my age now i'm more interested in world affairs whereas { when i } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> was younger i couldn't have cared less / <B> right / <A> i was busy making a living / <B> mhm / <A> and um now i'm i really am interested and i want to know what's going on all around me and i { wanna } / <B> [ right ] / <A> be informed and i honest to god never watch another show except fox news / <B> no / <A> i've looked at some of the um sitcoms that they have now and i told my husband i said every single one of them makes me sick / <B> right / <A> i i i don't even watch regular tv at all / <B> yeah
